Profane Proxy | Description | Profane Proxy is a unique Unset Ring. It modifies the function of the Summon Skitterbots skill gem.
Profane Proxy | Mechanics | Because the curse applied by the minion is the player's skill, it has most of the player's stats, such as curse limit and curse effect. Its base radius is 3 meters; the same as Skitterbots' regular chill/shock aura. [1] The curse aura's area of effect is scaled by generic stats that modify area of effect , but is not affected by modifiers to minion area of effect or area of effect of aura/hex skills. It also has some inconsistencies for some interactions such as a Curse Mastery. [2]
Profane Proxy | Mechanics | Players can equip the ring in both slots to modify both Skitterbots at the same time.
Profane Proxy | Item acquisition | Profane Proxy can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.

They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation. Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother, they fought to the death for every last drop. Right click to drink. Progenesis | Description | Progenesis is a unique Amethyst Flask.
Progenesis | Modifiers | When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead : This modifier functions similarly to and is multiplicative with Petrified Blood ( [1] , with Progenesis' effect working first), causing life loss over 4 seconds. Note that this is not considered damage over time. An equal amount of recoup can offset this damage, effectively functioning as damage reduction against hits.
Progenesis | Modifiers | This modifier value scales with flask effect. [2] 300% flask effect will cause all damage from hits to be taken as life loss over time; with 100% recoup or the equivalent after factoring life recovery rate, this provides effective immunity against hit damage.
Progenesis | Item acquisition | Progenesis has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced.
Progenesis | Item acquisition | Drops from Uber Maven.
Progenesis | Ruthless mode | Utility Flasks cannot gain charges while active in Ruthless mode. This flask also has a flask duration of (2.92-6.07) seconds instead.
Progenesis | Design attribution | Progenesis was created in a collaboration with Ben (use POE account name "Darkee" at that time) as a reward for taking a prize place in the 3.18 boss kill event. [3]

Pugilist | Description | Pugilist is a unique Viridian Jewel.
Pugilist | Mechanics | There are two jewel sockets that offer optimal placement for Pugilist. These are the socket between the starting positions of the Duelist and Ranger , and the socket near Fervour. Each socket has 110 dexterity within its radius. A Pugilist jewel placed into one of these sockets can provide up to 36% for each stat by allocating passive skills that grant dexterity within its radius.

Pyroshock Clasp | Mechanics | Enemies Ignited by you have #% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Fire and Enemies Shocked by you have #% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Lightning are additive with each other. They are not additive with damage taken as modifiers, because one modifier applies to a character and the other to an enemy.

Queen of the Forest | Legacy variants | The double legacy version is easier to achieve maximum movement speed from this item, but the drawback is the item has the lowest defence roll in the basetype, as defence value spread was introduced in version 3.16.0. This can be fixed by making the item a quasi-legacy variant by using Sacred Orbs. The evasion from the item can be further improved by adding 21%+ quality to the double legacy version. However, all method to add 21%+ quality to existing unique items are removed, so that QOTF with double legacy mods, as well as high basetype defence value, and 30% quality are more scare and valuable.

Quickening Covenant | Recipes | Quickening Covenant can be created from the following recipes:
Quickening Covenant | Legacy variants | Quickening Covenant has legacy variants.
Quickening Covenant | Legacy variants | Not corrupted Quickening Covenant are all legacy items and only be obtained from trading with other players in the permanent leagues. Also, corrupted Quickening Covenant that have corruption implicit are also legacy.
Quickening Covenant | Legacy variants | In addition, items dropped before version 3.16.0 have two Minions have +(10-12)% chance to Suppress Spell Damage mods, as it was used to be spell dodge and attack dodge mods. This can only be viewed in advanced mod description mod by pressing Alt button in PC (the keybind is different in controller). Since the combined (20-24)% value is from the two mods, to obtain the prefect roll (or the worst roll) on that combine mod only, by using a Divine Orb , the chance would be 1/3*1/3 = 1/9, instead of flat 1/5 chance. The probability distribution is similar to the probability distribution of two dices. However, since Divine Orb is expensive due to the version 3.19.0 changes, as well as it will also re-roll Minions have (12-16)% increased Attack Speed and Cast Speed mods, the property of this mod in the double legacy item may make it worth less than other non-corrupted, legacy version of this jewel.

Ralakesh's Impatience | Description | Ralakesh's Impatience is a pair of unique Riveted Boots.
Ralakesh's Impatience | Mechanics | Count as having maximum number of Endurance/Frenzy/Power Charges : Ralakesh's Impatience drops with a random modifier that treats the character as if they have their maximum number of charges of a given type.
Ralakesh's Impatience | Mechanics | Note that the character does not actually gain any charges when equipping Ralakesh's Impatience. Rather, the game will consider the character to have a number of charges equal to their maximum, regardless of the actual amount of charges they actually have at the moment, resulting in the following behavior: [1]
Ralakesh's Impatience | Mechanics | The character can only spend charges that they actually have. This modifier does not prevent or otherwise interact with anything that causes the character to gain or lose charges of the given type. This modifier also does not prevent effects that trigger on the condition "when you reach maximum endurance/frenzy/power charges" or other similarly worded conditions. These effects trigger when the character's charges of the given type actually reach the maximum number.
Ralakesh's Impatience | List of possible modifiers | Ralakesh's Impatience drops with one of three charge modifiers.
Ralakesh's Impatience | Item acquisition | Ralakesh's Impatience can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.

Rathpith Globe | Mechanics | Minions can be granted Rathpith Globe's bonuses through Necromantic Aegis. Additionally, certain minions (e.g. Animate Guardian of Smiting ) can equip a copy of this unique directly as well. The spell damage and spell critical strike chance will still be based on the player's maximum life, not the minion's. [1] [2]

Rational Doctrine | Infobox | <Three random synthesis implicit modifiers>. You have Consecrated Ground around you while stationary if Strength is your highest Attribute 25% chance to create Profane Ground on Critical Strike if Intelligence is your highest Attribute Effects of Consecrated Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds Effects of Profane Ground you create Linger for 4 seconds. Logic wanes in shining faith, and in rationalism, ardour dims Thus, the cynic and the zealot are divided But can they not be one and the same?. Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket. Acquisition Drop restricted Drops from Uber Venarius. Vendor Offer 8x Alchemy Shard
Rational Doctrine | Description | Rational Doctrine is a unique synthesised Cobalt Jewel.
Rational Doctrine | Mechanics and interactions | Consecrated Ground
Rational Doctrine | Mechanics and interactions | Profane Ground
Rational Doctrine | Mechanics and interactions | 25% chance to create Profane Ground on Critical Strike if Intelligence is your highest Attribute is a property inherited by your skills. It'll work even when the critical strikes are inflicted by proxies such as traps , mines and totems.
Rational Doctrine | Mechanics and interactions | Effects from the player's consecrated ground and profane ground will linger on you, allies, and enemies for 4 seconds after the effect would normally be removed. This also applies to additional effects such as the modifiers found on Gifts from Above or Bottled Faith , as entities will be considered "on Consecrated Ground/Profane Ground" while the linger effect is active. Note that the linger effect applies to any sources of these ground effects, not just those created by the modifiers from the jewel. This stat stacks additively with similar modifiers found on Ascendant 's Inquisitor and Inquisitor 's Pious Path.
Rational Doctrine | Mechanics and interactions | If Strength and Intelligence are tied for highest attribute , both Consecrated Ground and Profane Ground can be created.
Rational Doctrine | Mechanics and interactions | Scions and Templars using Crystallised Omniscience have equal default strength and intelligence, enabling both effects.
Rational Doctrine | Synthesised implicit modifiers | Rational Doctrine drops with three of the following synthesised implicit modifiers :
Rational Doctrine | Item acquisition | Rational Doctrine has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced.
Rational Doctrine | Item acquisition | Drops from Uber Venarius.
Rational Doctrine | Design attribution | Rational Doctrine was created in a collaboration with rawlnx (z4kur) as a reward for taking a prize place in the 3.18 boss kill event. [1]

Ravenous Passion | Description | Ravenous Passion is a unique Zealot Helmet.
Ravenous Passion | Mechanics | Rage
Ravenous Passion | Mechanics | With this item equipped, characters gain the following effects for each point of rage:
Ravenous Passion | Mechanics | Gain # Rage after Spending a total of 200 Mana counts the total mana spent on all skills from the previous time this effect procced. Rage is only gained once per instance of mana spent; exceeding 200 mana spent in a single skill usage does not grant additional rage. For example, spending 2000 mana on an Arcane Cloak activation will still only grant the specified amount of rage once.

Razor of the Seventh Sun | Description | Razor of the Seventh Sun is a unique Midnight Blade. It was the signature weapon of the Guardian of the Phoenix.
Razor of the Seventh Sun | Modifiers | Razor of the Seventh Sun possesses a unique form of recovery: Recover 1% of Life when you Ignite an Enemy. Unlike many effects granted by the infliction of ailments, it does not require that you inflict an ignite on a non-ignited enemy. Characters that can rapidly inflict a large number of ignites will be able to generate a large amount of life recovery while wielding this weapon.
Razor of the Seventh Sun | Item acquisition | Razor of the Seventh Sun can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.

Refuge in Isolation | Description | Refuge in Isolation is a unique Paladin Crown.
Refuge in Isolation | Mechanics | Note that luck applies before damage taken as modifiers, so the unlucky physical damage taken roll will not apply to elemental damage taken as physical damage due to the order of damage calculation. It will apply to physical damage taken as other damage types, however (see receiving damage ). This is not to be confused with converting enemy damage (e.g. Kaom's Binding ); luck rolls after conversion effects.

Relic of the Cycle | Description | Relic of the Cycle is a unique Crude Bow. It always comes with three linked white sockets.
Relic of the Cycle | Mechanics | The return effects of "Projectiles Return To You From Final Target" apply to all projectiles which can hit enemies and do not Pierce, Chain, Fork, or Split.
Relic of the Cycle | Mechanics | This effect does not apply to projectiles which target the ground and deal damage via Area of Effect, such as projectiles from Rolling Magma or Forbidden Rite , and does not apply to projectiles which have collided with terrain.
Relic of the Cycle | Mechanics | Useful interactions include:
Relic of the Cycle | Item acquisition | Relic of the Cycle is drop disabled.
Relic of the Cycle | Item acquisition | This item is unobtainable in the core game. It is only obtained in special event leagues such as Descent: Champions , Endless Delve , and Endless Heist.

Repentance | Description | Repentance is a pair of unique Crusader Gloves.
Repentance | Mechanics | The Iron Will mod has the same effect as the Iron Will keystone. Taking the keystone in addition to equipping this item will impart no additional benefit.
Repentance | Mechanics | If equipped in conjunction with Crown of Eyes , each point of strength grants 0.3% increased attack damage. This overrides strength's original effect of granting 0.2% increased melee physical damage per point (only the larger modifier applies). [1]
Repentance | Item acquisition | Repentance can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Repentance | Recipes | Repentance can be created from the following recipes:
Repentance | Foulborn modifiers | This unique item can be Foulborn with one or more of the following Foulborn modifiers replacing the corresponding regular modifiers.
Repentance | Design attribution | Repentance was created by supporter Mizzajl.
Repentance | Design attribution | Although it was added to The Awakening's Open Beta and intended to be released with Version 2.0.0 , the item was not released due to its creator's wish for a redesign. [2] The original version of the gloves had the modifier reduced Attack and Cast Speed. The redesigned version was released with Version 2.1.0.
Repentance | Legacy variants | Repentance has legacy variants.

Replica Alpha's Howl | Description | Replica Alpha's Howl is a unique Sinner Tricorne. It is the replica version of Alpha's Howl.
Replica Alpha's Howl | Mechanics | 16% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills : This modifier applies to all skills, not just those that are socketed in Alpha's Howl. The effect is additive with increased (Mana) Reservation Efficiency modifiers from passives and other items. However, the mana reservation efficiency itself has a diminishing marginal return on the actual mana reserved so that the reserved mana never reach zero, even stacking the efficiency to positive infinite. Read Reservation § Reducing reservation for details.

Replica Bitterdream | Mechanics | Compared to the original version, the replica and the original share the following modifiers : Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Inspiration and Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 15 Ice Bite. The 4 remaining modifiers are different.

Replica Bitterdream | Usage in recipes | Another vendor recipe (Replica Bitterdream + lv 20 Cold Penetration Support + lv 20 Fire Penetration Support + lv 20 Lightning Penetration Support ) returns a level 1 Elemental Penetration Support instead of a random Penetration Support gem. This is the only way to obtain this support gem.
Replica Bitterdream | Ruthless mode | In Ruthless mode , selling a Replica Bitterdream to a vendor returns the same gems as in the core game. [2]
Replica Bitterdream | Legacy variants | Replica Bitterdream has legacy variants.
Replica Bitterdream | Legacy variants | Note: Replica Bitterdream generated before version 3.23.0 will incorrectly display Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 1 Elemental Penetration ; however, all versions of this item grant the stats of a level 15 gem. This also applies to all other support for pre-3.19 variants.

Replica Cortex | Description | Replica Cortex is a unique Synthesised Map. The base map is T10 but the unique map has a fixed area level override (84). It is the replica version of Cortex.
Replica Cortex | Description | Cortex is not part of the Atlas of Worlds. There is no bonus objective for this map. However, this map can be witnessed by the Maven as part of the prerequisites of Maven's Invitation: The Feared.
Replica Cortex | Description | Despite not being on the atlas, this map can still be affected by atlas passive skill that affect Synthesised Maps. Note that atlas passive skill cannot affect maps from Kirac's atlas mission.
Replica Cortex | Modifiers | The map has two pools of map modifiers, one draw from "synthesis global " pool (mod domain = 19), one from "synthesis local" pool (mod domain = 18).
Replica Cortex | Legacy variants | Replica Cortex has legacy variants due to map series. Prior version 3.17.0, it is a unique Relic Chambers Map.
Replica Cortex | Item acquisition | Replica Cortex has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Replicas can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist.
Replica Cortex | Recipes | Replica Cortex can be created from the following recipes:

Replica Covenant | Mechanics | Applicable skill gems socketed in this item are supported by level 29 Added Cold Damage Support. All support stats are accounted for, including the cost and reservation multiplier.
Replica Covenant | Mechanics | Skills gain a Base Energy Shield Cost equal to 200% of Base Mana Cost : this modifier adds a base energy shield cost to skills, even when they cost life instead of mana through e.g. Blood Magic or Lifetap Support.

Replica Doedre's Damning | Description | Replica Doedre's Damning is a unique Paua Ring. It is the replica version of Doedre's Damning.
Replica Doedre's Damning | Modifiers | You can apply one fewer Curse decreases the curse limit and stacks with other similar modifiers.
Replica Doedre's Damning | Modifiers | As the default curse limit is 1, equipping this ring would prevent characters without additional curse limits from being able to apply a curse.
Replica Doedre's Damning | Modifiers | Certain mechanics like Doedre's Skin or Sentari's Answer can ignore curse limits, making it a source of free curse effect.
Replica Doedre's Damning | Modifiers | Anathema also overrides this mechanic.
Replica Doedre's Damning | Item acquisition | Replica Doedre's Damning has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Replicas can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist.

Replica Doedre's Damning | Legacy variants | Beware of using a Divine Orb to improve the rolls of Int, res and mana gain on kill mods of the pre-3.16 variant, as it will also worsen the mod (25-35)% increased Effect of your Curses.
Replica Doedre's Damning | Legacy variants | It is not possible to tell the post-3.16 and pre-3.19 (i.e. 3.16, 3.17, 3.18 versions) Replica Doedre's Damning, to the current droppable variant. Read Doedre's Damning § Legacy variants for the math.

Replica Dragonfang's Flight | Trivia | Despite having "Replica" in its name, it is not an actual Replica unique item. This is intentional, as the item represents a replica of an item that does not actually exist.

Replica Farrul's Fur | Description | Replica Farrul's Fur is a unique Triumphant Lamellar. It is the replica version of Farrul's Fur.
Replica Farrul's Fur | Mechanics | Gain up to your maximum number of Frenzy and Endurance Charges when you gain Cat's Agility : You will always be at maximum endurance and frenzy charges if the duration of Cat's Stealth + Cat's Agility less than or equal the duration of your endurance and frenzy charges (default is 10s). Since the base duration of Cat's Stealth + Cat's Agility is 12s (due to +2.00 seconds to Cat's Agility Duration on Farrul's Fur), this would require at least 20% increased charge duration (e.g. Charge Mastery or Frenzy Charge Duration ) or 17% reduced skill effect duration (e.g. Window of Opportunity and preceding nodes).

Replica Frostbreath | Description | Replica Frostbreath is a unique Ornate Mace. It is the replica version of Frostbreath.
Replica Frostbreath | Mechanics | Dual Wielding : When using a skill that deals damage with both weapons (such as Dual Strike ), weapons calculate damage separately, then the results are summed together. So against a chilled enemy, each hand's damage would independently be doubled, then added together to get the combined hit value for that attack. [1]

Replica Hyrri's Truth | Description | Replica Hyrri's Truth is a unique Jade Amulet. It is the replica version of Hyrri's Truth.
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Skills | The level 22 Hatred skill granted by the item had the same function as the Hatred skill gem.
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Skills | A normal Hatred skill gem would reserved 50% mana. However, due to the unique mod Hatred has 100% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency , The Hatred skill granted from this item instead reserves 25%. If the player has a Hatred skill gem socketed, this modifier will also affect that gem.
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Catalysts | If using Fertile Catalyst to have 20% quality, the new reservation would be 50 % / ( 100 % + 120 % ) = 22.73 % \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}50\%/(100\%+120\%)=22.73\%.
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Catalysts | Alternatively, the Dexterity mod and the crit multi mod can be affected by quality from Intrinsic Catalyst and Unstable Catalyst respectively.
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Item acquisition | Replica Hyrri's Truth has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Replicas can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist.
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Recipes | Replica Hyrri's Truth can be created from the following recipes:
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Legacy variants | Replica Hyrri's Truth has legacy variants.
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Legacy variants | Replica Hyrri's Truth that dropped before version 3.16.0 would not show the default value of the mod Hatred has 100% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency (100) in the trade site. This is because the legacy item uses a legacy mod (which has internal value of -50). The legacy item functions mostly the same as the current variant, just affected by Fertile Catalyst in an interval of 2 (ie., the Efficiency will changed to 102, 104 and so on until reaching 120 for 20% quality by using the catalyst, but the effect of 3% quality is the same as 2% quality due to round down and the interal coding behind: "hatred_mana_reservation_efficiency_-2%_per_1").
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Legacy variants | *** Note that it is not common among legacy unique items, but using a Divine Orb will remove the legacy mods Adds (12-15) to (24-28) Physical Damage to Attacks, Adds (11-15) to (23-28) Cold Damage to Attacks, (0.8-1)% of Cold Damage Leeched as Life , as the dev had set a new default value of 0 on the legacy mods. This is not consistent among the same patch as using the orb on Allelopathy and Replica Allelopathy , which also nerfed in the same patch, would not remove the legacy mod.
Replica Hyrri's Truth | Legacy variants | Apart from gaining new default value for # to Dexterity, +#% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier mods. Using the orb will not gain Bow Attacks have Culling Strike mod.

Replica Loreweave | Description | Replica Loreweave is a unique Elegant Ringmail. It is the replica version of Loreweave.
Replica Loreweave | Mechanics | The Your Maximum Resistances are (70-72)% modifier is a hard cap on the player's maximum resistance. Players cannot get above the stated roll, even when using a Purity aura , but also cannot drop below the stated value, usually as a consequence of map modifiers. Thus, the player's maximum resistances will always be equal to that number. However, players still have to gather resistances to reach that number, as Loreweave doesn't grant the resistances by itself.
Replica Loreweave | Item acquisition | Replica Loreweave has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Replicas can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist.

Replica Maloney's Mechanism | Description | Replica Maloney's Mechanism is a unique Ornate Quiver. It is the replica version of Maloney's Mechanism.
Replica Maloney's Mechanism | Modifiers | The replica version has the mod Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Cast a Spell while wielding a Bow , with a 1 second Cooldown instead. The other mods are the same as the original version.
Replica Maloney's Mechanism | Modifiers | Replica Maloney's Mechanism can trigger at most 3 bow skills , as the quiver only has 3 sockets. The socketed bow skills cannot be used by the player directly, as is standard for skills supported by a trigger.
Replica Maloney's Mechanism | Modifiers | Based on the datamined value, the cooldown is 1 second (The item uses the same Support as the original unique item). [1]
Replica Maloney's Mechanism | Item acquisition | Replica Maloney's Mechanism has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Replicas can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist.
Replica Maloney's Mechanism | Recipes | Replica Maloney's Mechanism can be created from the following recipes:
Replica Maloney's Mechanism | Trivia | The flavour text and the name of the item indicate that the item is related to Riker Maloney, Midnight Tinkerer. Despite the fact that the first item named after Maloney, Maloney's Nightfall , was a supporter-designed item released before Betrayal league. GGG retroactively changed the Maloney surname to tie-in with the Betrayal league lore.

Replica Nebulis | Description | Replica Nebulis is a unique Void Sceptre. It is the replica version of Nebulis.
Replica Nebulis | Mechanics | Replica Nebulis is neither synthesised nor fractured , therefore it does not have synthesised implicit modifiers or fractured explicit modifiers.
Replica Nebulis | Mechanics | Missing resistances refers to the amount of resistance your character has below the current maximum. A character only needs to have a total of 45-30% resistance (depending on the (10-15)% roll) under the maximum across any of the three elements to cap its effects (can lower further with certain heist enchantments ).
Replica Nebulis | Strategy | It is possible to achieve 100% damage taken as conversion to another element through multiple sources like Tempered by War , Divine Flesh , Font of Thunder , Sublime Vision and Watcher's Eye Purity aura mods, and Bound By Destiny. This allows players to safely ignore getting resistances for an element and fully utilize the benefits of Replica Nebulis without negatively impacting their defences, as long as damage taken as doesn't exceed 100%.
Replica Nebulis | Item acquisition | Replica Nebulis has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Replicas can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist.
Replica Nebulis | Recipes | Replica Nebulis can be created from the following recipes:
Replica Nebulis | Legacy variants | Replica Nebulis has legacy variants.

Replica Paradoxica | Description | Replica Paradoxica is a unique Vaal Rapier. It is the replica version of Paradoxica.
Replica Paradoxica | Veiled modifiers | Replica Paradoxica has six veiled modifiers :
Replica Paradoxica | Veiled modifiers | The sixth veiled modifier on Replica Paradoxica can be a standard Veiled prefix, or any of the Immortal Syndicate 's signature veiled prefixes ( Catarina's Veiled , Haku's Veiled , Tora's Veiled , etc.). The exact prefix can be determined in game by enabling advanced mod description mode and holding Alt while inspecting the item.
Replica Paradoxica | Veiled prefixes | Unveiling a Veiled prefix draws from a pool of generic veiled prefixes ( Chosen ). Unveiling one of the signature veiled prefixes, such as Vagan's Veiled , draws from a pool of both exclusive veiled prefixes (in this case Vagan's ) and generic veiled prefixes.
Replica Paradoxica | Veiled suffixes | Unveiling an of the Veil suffix draws from a pool of generic veiled suffixes ( of the Order ).
Replica Paradoxica | Item acquisition | Replica Paradoxica has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Replicas can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist.
Replica Paradoxica | Recipes | Replica Paradoxica can be created from the following recipes:
Replica Paradoxica | Ruthless mode | Although veiled rare items cannot be found in Ruthless mode , this item will still drop with veiled modifiers and can be unveiled.
Replica Paradoxica | Legacy variants | Players could remove legacy unveiled mods from legacy (pre-3.14.0) Replica Paradoxicas, as unveiled mods were considered crafted mods, but CANNOT craft a mod back on the item. Therefore, removing crafting mods would make this item have no explicit modifiers.

Replica Rumi's Concoction | Infobox | Lasts 0.60 Seconds Consumes 30 of 60 Charges on use +1500 to Armour. Requires Level 68. Gain 1 Endurance Charge on use +(35-50)% Chance to Block Attack Damage during Effect +(20-30)% Chance to Block Spell Damage during Effect Petrified during Effect 90% reduced Duration. Acquisition Drop restricted Replicas can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist. Vendor Offer 12x Alchemy Shard
Replica Rumi's Concoction | Description | Replica Rumi's Concoction is a unique Granite Flask. It is the replica version of Rumi's Concoction.
Replica Rumi's Concoction | Modifiers | By default, using this flask creates three Flask Buff icons:
Replica Rumi's Concoction | Modifiers | Similarly to being frozen , petrified modifies the player's action speed by reducing it by 100%. Effects that prevent or minimize lowering of action speed , like Trickster's One Step Ahead , Juggernaut 's Unstoppable , Kaom's Roots , or some Scourge modifiers , will prevent the player from being stuck in place and unable to use any skills during this flask's effect.
Replica Rumi's Concoction | Modifiers | Replica Rumi's Concoction has an incredibly short duration; by default, with 0% quality , the flask effect duration is 0.6 seconds. In order to improve its uptime, players will likely want to apply an Enkindling Orb for (80-100)% increased Duration , or corrupted the flask to gain -10% to +10% quality on top of the quality from Glassblower's Bauble , to counteract the 90% reduced Duration modifier (stacks additively to the enchantment and multiplicative to flask quality). However, the enchantment will make the flask be unable to gain charges while active, making it primarily used as a burst of block-based defences.

Replica Tasalio's Sign | Description | Replica Tasalio's Sign is a unique Sapphire Ring. It is the replica version of Tasalio's Sign.
Replica Tasalio's Sign | Modifiers | The replica version modified the character's chance to inflict freeze ailment to zero ( Your Cold Damage cannot Freeze ), instead of adding #% chance to Freeze from the original. However, it can be override by item such as Expedition's End , which grants all damage a chance to freeze, instead of cold damage only. Using Expedition's End and Replica Tasalio's Sign, all damage but cold would have a chance to freeze enemies.
Replica Tasalio's Sign | Modifiers | Both replica version and original version have the following mods: +(200-300) to Evasion Rating , Adds # to # Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks and Adds # to # Cold Damage against Chilled Enemies , which the replica has larger values on added damage.
Replica Tasalio's Sign | Modifiers | Instead of #% chance to Avoid being Chilled , the replica version has the mod Immune to Chill. This unique item mod can only be found in Replica Tasalio's Sign or Replica Allelopathy as of 3.12 patch. They do not stack with each other. The character will immune to chill ailment with either one item or both.

Replica unique item | Description | Replica unique items or replicas are engineered reproductions of existing unique items created by Administrator Qotra and his team of researchers. They resemble the originals in design, but they come with a particular twist that makes them functionally different.
Replica unique item | Description | Replicas can be obtained in the Curio Display in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heists. In almost all cases Replicas share the same base type as the original item. For example, both Replica Bitterdream and Bitterdream are unique Shadow Sceptres. However, the modifiers on the items may differ significantly.
Replica unique item | Description | All Replicas have names starting with Replica and symbol in front and at the back of their names. Although these symbols are not mutually exclusive with influenced items (which also have symbols), Replicas that do not have influence(s) by default cannot be obtained with influence.
Replica unique item | Description | Note that despite having "Replica" in its name, Replica Dragonfang's Flight is a core drop and can be obtained anywhere; it is not a true Replica item and does not have the symbol in its name. In-game this is explained by the item being a Replica of an item that does not exist, making it the actual genuine item.
Replica unique item | Trivia | According to the flavor text, the nature of said research team closely resembles SCP Foundation , including:
Replica unique item | Trivia | .

We are still finding explosives in the vents months later." - Administrator Qotra. Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket. Acquisition Drop disabled. Vendor Offer 4x Alchemy Shard

Replica Volkuur's Guidance | Description | Replica Volkuur's Guidance is a pair of unique Zealot Gloves. It is the replica version of Volkuur's Guidance.
Replica Volkuur's Guidance | Mechanics | Your Chaos Damage can Ignite : Allows the character's chaos damage to Ignite enemies, meaning that base Chaos Damage can contribute in addition to base Fire Damage for Ignite. Ignites from base Chaos Damage scale with increased and more modifiers to both Fire/Elemental Damage (e.g. Elemental Overload ) and Chaos Damage, but unaffected by modifiers to Chaos Damage taken (e.g. Withered ), Chaos Resistance, or Chaos Damage over Time Multiplier, as Ignites only inherently deal Fire Damage over Time.

Replica Wings of Entropy | Description | Replica Wings of Entropy is a unique Ezomyte Axe. It is the replica version of Wings of Entropy.
Replica Wings of Entropy | Mechanics | Counts as Dual Wielding : Using Replica Wings of Entropy counts as dual wielding , and therefore it benefits from the more attack speed and additional block chance of dual wielding. It also benefits from any modifiers pertaining to either dual wielding or two-handed weapons, but not one-handed weapons. However, it cannot be used to perform skills that require a two-handed weapon, such as Sweep. Replica Wings of Entropy also opens new possibilities for skill and support choices because it provides the potential for dual wielding with a six-linked weapon, an option not normally available since one-handed weapons can have at most three sockets.
Replica Wings of Entropy | Mechanics | Main hand and off hand : Since Replica Wings of Entropy counts as dual-wielding, each of the main and off hand weapon damages can be modified separately. Allocating the Ambidexterity passive skill will modify each hand separately.
Replica Wings of Entropy | Item acquisition | Replica Wings of Entropy has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Replicas can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist.
Replica Wings of Entropy | Recipes | Replica Wings of Entropy can be created from the following recipes:

Rewritten Distant Memory | Description | Rewritten Distant Memory is a unique Synthesised Map. The base map may have variable tier, but the area level of the unique map is overridden as 81.
Rewritten Distant Memory | Description | Rewritten Distant Memory is not part of the Atlas of Worlds. There is no bonus objective for this map. However, this map can be witnessed by the Maven as part of the prerequisites of Maven's Invitation: The Forgotten.
Rewritten Distant Memory | Description | Despite not being on the atlas, this map can still be affected by atlas passive skills that affect Synthesised Maps. Note that atlas passive skills cannot affect maps from Kirac's atlas missions.
Rewritten Distant Memory | Modifiers | The map has two pools of map modifiers, one draw from "synthesis global" pool (mod domain = 19), one from "synthesis local" pool (mod domain = 18). Synthesis map modifiers are not visible on the map itself, and these modifiers are only revealed upon entering the map.
Rewritten Distant Memory | Layout | The map uses the Basilica Map tileset. The area contains some areas of raised elevation that can be accessed via staircases or movement skills. The boundaries of the map are surrounded in blue memory decay typical of a Synthesis zone, but cannot be directly interacted with. A portal to the boss room is located at the top left.

In addition, for some unknown reason also retained to have +16% to all Elemental Resistances implicit. Be cautious on buying the unique foil version by checking the item mod.

Romira's Banquet | Description | Romira's Banquet is a unique Diamond Ring.
Romira's Banquet | Mechanics | Gain a Power Charge on Non-Critical Strike : The player gains a power charge when a skill they use does not roll a critical strike. Only one charge is gained each time a skill is used, even if the skill hits multiple enemies or if it is supported by Multistrike Support or Spell Echo Support. This also makes wearing multiple copies of this ring ill-advised.
Romira's Banquet | Mechanics | Lose all Power Charges on Critical Strike : This effect occurs after any power charges are otherwise consumed or gained. When used in conjunction with Cast On Critical Strike Support and Cold Snap , for example, Cold Snap will consume a power charge to bypass its cooldown, after which Romira's Banquet will remove any remaining power charges.
Romira's Banquet | Item acquisition | Romira's Banquet can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Romira's Banquet | Recipes | Romira's Banquet can be created from the following recipes:
Romira's Banquet | Foulborn modifiers | This unique item can be Foulborn with one or more of the following Foulborn modifiers replacing the corresponding regular modifiers.
Romira's Banquet | Legacy variants | Romira's Banquet has legacy variants.
Romira's Banquet | Design attribution | Romira's Banquet was created by supporter hoargald. [1]
Romira's Banquet | Build of the Week | Romira's Banquet was featured in Season 2 Episode 11 of the Build of the Week series released by Grinding Gear Games.

Roth's Reach | Item acquisition | Roth's Reach can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Roth's Reach | Recipes | Roth's Reach can be created from the following recipes:
Roth's Reach | Legacy variants | Roth's Reach has legacy variants.
Roth's Reach | Legacy variants | Moreover, players can create a hybrid legacy variant that have legacy implicit (6-12)% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills (in turn can reroll into 20-24% value range by using a Blessed Orb ) and all current unique explicit mods of this item, by chancing legacy Recurve Bow base that dropped after version 1.2.0 and before version 2.0.0. This can only be done in the permanent league by acquiring the base.
Roth's Reach | Legacy variants | In fact, all implicit variants of this bow can be chanced. And base on whatever it is chanced before or after version 3.19, their explicit would be different. However, bow without implicit (the pre-3.9 legacy variant) does not worth much in permanent leagues (due to large supply, even they now have (4-8)% increased Attack Speed as legacy mod), so that it has no point to chance it, as the cost of buying a legacy Roth's Reach that without an implicit , and then use a Divine Orb on it, may still way more economical to use a large amount of Orb of Chance to obtain a bow without the implicit AND (4-8)% increased Attack Speed mod.
Roth's Reach | Legacy variants | Or except the "collector value" of Roth's Reach that without implicit, the legacy bow with both +(15-25)% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier implicit and legacy (4-8)% increased Attack Speed , may worth more to collect in term of power level of the unique, as the bow with implicit can be Divined to even more powerful version than the current droppable Roth's Reach.
Roth's Reach | Legacy variants | To sum up, beware of scammer that offer the without implicit Roth's Reach variant in the barter trade.
Roth's Reach | Lore | This item is named after Roth pirate family. Notable members are Weylam Roth (also appears in the flavor text), Lilly Roth and Lussi "Rotmother" Roth , the leader of Brinerot Warbands.

Saqawal's Flock | Description | Saqawal's Flock is a unique Silken Hood.
Saqawal's Flock | Mechanics | Saqawal's Flock grants a 100% chance to trigger level 20 Twister when the player gains Avian's Might or Avian's Flight from Aspect of the Avian. Being granted Avian's Might or Avian's Flight from a nearby ally through Saqawal's Nest does not trigger the skill. [1]
Saqawal's Flock | Mechanics | Tornado is a physical skill and is affected by Foulborn Rive 's Physical Skills have 1% increased Duration per 12 Intelligence MutatedUniqueClaw13PhysicalSkillEffectDurationPerIntelligence Intrinsic Physical Skills have 1% increased Duration per 12 Intelligence.
Saqawal's Flock | Item acquisition | Saqawal's Flock has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Saqawal's Flock can only drop from Saqawal, First of the Sky in Saqawal's Roost.
Saqawal's Flock | Monster restrictions | This item can be acquired from the following monsters:
Saqawal's Flock | Recipes | Saqawal's Flock can be created from the following recipes:
Saqawal's Flock | Notes | Saqawal's Flock was formerly a build enabling item, with builds cycling Aspect of the Avian many times per second to repeatedly cast Twister, however such builds are very sensitive to balance changes to additive (increased/reduced) and multiplicative (more/less) modifiers to skill effect duration. For instance, changing Awakened Swift Affliction Support from '25% reduced duration' to '25% less duration' significantly lowered the trigger rate that was possible to receive with this skill by reducing the total additive duration reduction that could be applied to the skill, until Crucible mods with reduced skill effect duration were added in 3.21, prompting the addition of a 100ms cooldown to the skill in a hotfix due to the significant server performance issues the buid caused. While there are currently enough sources of additive duration reduction to reach the cast rate cap, the More Duration Support which used to grant increased duration to the linked skill (offsetting the effect of global reduced duration on the Twister skill itself) now grants multiplicative duration, thus this build is currently non-functional.

Scold's Bridle | Description | Scold's Bridle is a unique Mind Cage.
Scold's Bridle | Mechanics | Scold's Bridle's unique modifier causes the player to deal self-damage whenever mana is spent on upfront costs. This includes mana spent at every stage of a channelled skill , but does not work with continuous costs such as Bladefall of Trarthus. The damage is secondary damage. [1] The amount of damage taken from this effect is affected by physical damage reduction, such as from armour or endurance charges , as well as modifiers to damage taken, such as from Fortify or Oro's Sacrifice.
Scold's Bridle | Item acquisition | Scold's Bridle can drop anywhere. It can be chanced. Scold's Bridle belongs to a special group of unique items called league-specific items , which can be obtained from certain divination cards and other sources in addition to their normal acquisition methods.

Scold's Bridle | Foulborn modifiers | This unique item can be Foulborn with one or more of the following Foulborn modifiers replacing the corresponding regular modifiers.

Self-Flagellation | Description | Self-Flagellation is a unique Viridian Jewel. In patch 3.26, a sample of 576 Viridian Jewels yielded 25 Self-Flagellation, or a 4.3% chance per corrupted jewel.
Self-Flagellation | Item acquisition | Self-Flagellation has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced.
Self-Flagellation | Recipes | Self-Flagellation can be created from the following recipes:
Self-Flagellation | Strategy | When trying to self- curse multiple times, the player should be looking for extra curses that don't count towards the active limit. These can be found on Soul Mantle or Ylfeban's Trickery.
Self-Flagellation | Strategy | Items that grant #% reduced Effect of Curses on you , such as the affixes found on jewels and flasks , Kikazaru and Thief's Torment , or Consecrated Ground help negate the downside of having these curses. Note that these modifiers can be improved using Imbued Catalyst s. Unaffected by Curses or Hexproof can also be achieved by Atziri's Reflection or Viridi's Veil.

The Darktongue clan has long let their undead feed at the table with their slaves, and occasionally on them. Place into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket. Acquisition Not in game
Selfless Leadership | Description | Selfless Leadership was a unique Cobalt Jewel. It was on the The Awakening Beta realm but never added to the core game. [1] [2] According to Grinding Gear Games developers, Selfless Leadership was not added to the game in The Awakening due to its design having certain technical issues that they would need to attempt to resolve at some point in the future. Shackles of the Wretched | Description | Shackles of the Wretched is a pair of unique Chain Gloves.
Shackles of the Wretched | Mechanics | Shackles of the Wretched is used in some self-curse setups.
Shackles of the Wretched | Mechanics | The modifier Curses in this item are reflected back to you currently does not work with Blasphemy Support , Curse On Hit minions, or corruptions that apply a curse on hit or grant a leveled curse skill, even if it is linked with a Trigger gem. [1]
Shackles of the Wretched | Mechanics | Curses from skill gems linked to Trigger gems like Hextouch Support or Cast when Damage Taken Support will properly reflect curses back to the character.
Shackles of the Wretched | Mechanics | Less Effect modifiers, such as those from Bane and Hex Master do not apply to reflected curses, [2] though increased Effect from the character's stats and linked gems do apply.

Shadowstitch | Item acquisition | The chance to obtain Shadowstitch replaces the outcome of obtaining a Double Corrupted item. Note that the Sacrificial Garb must be normal rarity for this to occur. Magic, Rare or Unique Sacrificial Garbs will Double Corrupt as usual without turning into a Shadowstitch.
Shadowstitch | Legacy variants | Shadowstitch has a legacy variant.
Shadowstitch | Alternate artwork | Note that the Timeworn version does not have (250-350)% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield. Despite it may possible to obtain one with that mod after the version 3.10.0 from the Reliquary, [ guesswork? ] as Timeworn Reliquary Key can still be used despite drop disabled after the end of Delve league.

Shattershard | Description | Shattershard is a unique Crimson Round Shield.
Shattershard | Mechanics | Shield Shatter : On block , triggers a spell that deals physical damage in an area. Damage of the spell scales with shield quality. After blocking, it applies a buff that grants added spell physical damage per shield quality, but causing the user to be unable to block and gain no defenses from the equipped shield.
Shattershard | Mechanics | Shield Shatter can be forced to trigger with The Monastery Bell even while the buff is active, as the skill itself doesn't have a cooldown.
Shattershard | Item acquisition | Shattershard has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced.
Shattershard | Item acquisition | Shattershard can be obtained from Curio Displays in the final reward rooms of any Grand Heist.

Shavronne's Gambit | Description | Shavronne's Gambit is a pair of unique Scholar Boots.
Shavronne's Gambit | Mechanics | #% increased Movement Speed when on Full Life You are treated as full life when using this item in Chaos Inoculation build, or using Coward's Chains.
Shavronne's Gambit | Mechanics | (double legacy item only) #% of Energy Shield Regenerated per second while on Low Life. They are items that grant the character having full life and low life status at the same time, such as Coward's Legacy (count as low life while maintaining full life: e.g. CI build), or Coward's Chains (count as full life when maintaining low life such as low life ES build)
Shavronne's Gambit | Mechanics | (150-200)% increased Stun and Block Recovery By using a Divine Orb on post-2.6 Shavronne's Gambit (or using the orb on pre-2.6 item and accepting the MS will be lowered) would obtain a Shavronne's Gambit with a high value of increased Stun and Block Recovery, which is much higher than the T1 mod ( of Corundum Skin of Corundum Skin Suffix (26-28)% increased Stun and Block Recovery ) on non-unique boots. This may benefit ES build that does not have a large life pool but want to increase stun and block recovery. The mod value (after using a Divine) is also the highest among unique boots, which is the same as Kahuturoa's Certainty if only counting the max value. Note that Kahuturoa's Certainty is a Armour based boots.
Shavronne's Gambit | Mechanics | (100-140)% increased Energy Shield the mod value is more than the current non-legacy T1 and T2 mod on the non-unique intelligence-based boots. However, since Scholar Boots is not an end-game base, as well as the unique lack of flat ES mod, overall the item does not provide as much ES as end game T1 mods rare rarity item.
Shavronne's Gambit | Item acquisition | Shavronne's Gambit is drop disabled.
Shavronne's Gambit | Legacy variants | Legacy modifiers and base items are retained when upgrading uniques to their fated counterparts. So because Shavronne's Pace has legacy variants, Shavronne's Gambit effectively gains variants in addition to its own.
Shavronne's Gambit | Legacy variants | Note that player can create quasi-legacy variant by using pre-2.6 (or pre-2.0) legacy Shavronne's Pace in the process of fated item prophecy post-2.6 patch (and before the removal of the prophecy system in version 3.17.0). Those hybrid variants are out of the scope of above table, thus omitted. Player also able to create quasi-legacy variant simply by updating the mod value by using a Divine Orb.

Singularity | Modifiers | The radius of the Singularity item aura is 35. [1] It cannot be altered with modifiers to area of effect because the aura is a property of the item, not a character. [2]
Singularity | Item acquisition | Singularity can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Singularity | Recipes | Singularity can be created from the following recipes:
Singularity | Foulborn modifiers | This unique item can be Foulborn with one or more of the following Foulborn modifiers replacing the corresponding regular modifiers.
Singularity | Legacy variants | Singularity has legacy variants.

Skyforth | Description | Skyforth is a pair of unique Sorcerer Boots.
Skyforth | Mechanics | With these boots equipped the chance to become stunned is based on mana instead of life.
Skyforth | Mechanics | You have no Life Regeneration renders Zealot's Oath nonfunctional, as there will be no life regeneration to convert into energy shield regeneration.
Skyforth | Item acquisition | Skyforth can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Skyforth | Recipes | Skyforth can be created from the following recipes:
Skyforth | Foulborn modifiers | This unique item can be Foulborn with one or more of the following Foulborn modifiers replacing the corresponding regular modifiers.
Skyforth | Legacy variants | Skyforth does not have a legacy variant visually. But in trade site , the variant that drops before version 3.16.0 , the default mod value of 12% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills will not be shown, while the current droppable variant, the mod value is shown as [12], due to the backend coding of old mana reservation mod (which converted to reservation efficiency without specify to mana ) and new reservation efficiency mod.
Skyforth | Legacy variants | The current mod also does not have "mana" mod tag, but currently there are no boot enchantments or quality to affect boots mod with such tag.
Skyforth | Design attribution | Skyforth was created by supporter Skyforth. [1]
Skyforth | Design attribution | The drop level of 84 and high rarity tier of this item was requested by the creator of this item [1]. It was historically considered a "chase unique" due to the difficulty of obtaining item level 84+ items for several leagues after its release.

Snakebite | Infobox | Evasion: (260-344) Energy Shield: (21-25). Requires Level 58 , 45 Dex, 45 Int. (150-180)% increased Evasion Rating +(60-70) to maximum Life 2% increased Attack Speed per Frenzy Charge 6% increased Accuracy Rating per Frenzy Charge 10% reduced Frenzy Charge Duration per Frenzy Charge Attacks have 60% chance to Poison while at maximum Frenzy Charges +5% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Poison per Frenzy Charge. "As the serpent shuns thought, It shuns fear. It strikes with the speed of wrath And the skill of compulsion." - Deshret, The Red Sekhema. Vendor Offer 12x Alchemy Shard 6x Alteration Shard
Snakebite | Description | Snakebite is a pair of unique Assassin's Mitts.
Snakebite | Mechanics | While at maximum frenzy charges , the character's attacks have a 60% chance to inflict poison.
Snakebite | Maximum Frenzy Charge Manipulation | The modifier Attacks have 60% chance to Poison while at maximum Frenzy Charges is affected by modifiers that increase or decrease maximum frenzy charges. Most notably, using three Pacifism unique jewels with no additional maximum frenzy charges will reduce the maximum number of frenzy charges to zero, effectively permanently granting a chance to poison.
Snakebite | Maximum Frenzy Charge Manipulation | Alternatively, two Pacifisms and the modifier +(1-2) to Minimum Frenzy Charges from Redeemer - influenced items or the crafted modifier +1 to Minimum Frenzy Charges also work.
Snakebite | Maximum Frenzy Charge Manipulation | Ralakesh's Impatience can also be used to be considered as always at maximum Frenzy Charges and benefit permanently from Attacks have 60% chance to Poison while at maximum Frenzy Charges.
Snakebite | Item acquisition | Snakebite can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Snakebite | Recipes | Snakebite can be created from the following recipes:
Snakebite | Foulborn modifiers | This unique item can be Foulborn with one or more of the following Foulborn modifiers replacing the corresponding regular modifiers.
Snakebite | Design attribution | Snakebite was created by supporter SirLoin. [ citation needed ]
Snakebite | Legacy variants | Snakebite has legacy variants.
Snakebite | Legacy variants | The official trade site filter Attacks have #% chance to Poison while at maximum Frenzy Charges and an value of 100 are not able to filter out the pre-3.0 double legacy variant. However, using the NOT condition on the aforementioned mod, can filter out all post-3.0 Snakebite, effectively leaving the double legacy Snakebite.
Snakebite | Legacy variants | Moreover, the legacy mod and the current mod are using their own internal use mod ids, so that after using the Divine Orb , the legacy mod value of 100% chance to poison is retained. Note that the mod +5% to Damage over Time Multiplier for Poison per Frenzy Charge CANNOT be gained by using the Orb, so that it may not worth it to just reroll the evasion and life mods on legacy items.

Song of the Sirens | Infobox | Fishing Rod Physical Damage: 8-15 Critical Strike Chance: 5.00% Attacks per Second: 1.20 Weapon Range: 1.3 metres. Siren Worm Bait (50-40)% reduced Quantity of Fish Caught (50-60)% increased Rarity of Fish Caught You can catch Exotic Fish. Give a man a fish, and you can feed him for a day. But give a fish a man, and you can feed it for a month. Acquisition Drop level: 100 Fishing. Vendor Offer 2x Alchemy Shard 13x Alteration Shard. Weapon DPS Physical: 13.8 Phys+Chaos: 13.8 Total: 13.8
Song of the Sirens | Description | Song of the Sirens is a unique Fishing Rod.
Song of the Sirens | Item acquisition | Song of the Sirens can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Song of the Sirens | Recipes | Song of the Sirens can be created from the following recipes:
Song of the Sirens | Recipes | Song of the Sirens is in fact not drop-restricted , but has been datamined to have a drop level of 100. Because of this, it is not possible to obtain Song of the Sirens from most non- divination card sources of items. There are so far two notable exceptions: It is possible to chance a Fishing Rod (as chancing ignores the base's item level), or by dropping it directly from the boss of The Coward's Trial (which drops a guaranteed item level 100 unique). It is also possible to Ancient Orb a Reefbane with item level 100, also only available from The Coward's Trial. [1]
Song of the Sirens | Recipes | It can be obtained from all of the divination cards listed above, and as a reward from Inscribed Ultimatums.
Song of the Sirens | Status as an Easter egg | The inclusion of Song of the Sirens in Path of Exile is an Easter egg in reference to a running joke by Grinding Gear Games about the existence of secret gameplay features related to fishing. It has so far not been confirmed that any such gameplay features legitimately exist.
Song of the Sirens | Trivia | Song of the Siren's flavour text may be a reference to the proverb " give a man a fish and you feed him for a day; teach a man to fish and you feed him for a lifetime ".

Soul Mantle | Description | Soul Mantle is a unique Spidersilk Robe.
Soul Mantle | Modifiers | Applicable skill gems socketed in this item are supported by level 20 Spell Totem Support. All support stats are accounted for, including the cost and reservation multiplier.
Soul Mantle | Modifiers | Whenever the character's totem "dies", the character is inflicted with a random hex curse (except Silence ). This curse does not count toward any active curse limit; it will be applied in addition to any existing curses. [1] A totem dies when its life is reduced to zero, when its duration expires, or when it is destroyed due to the character's active totem limit. [2]
Soul Mantle | Modifiers | A character may obtain some curse resistance using Thief's Torment or Kikazaru to counter this. Atziri's Reflection , can be used to completely nullify the negative effect of Soul Mantle. The jewel Self-Flagellation can be used to gain a certain advantage from the curses. Consecrated ground from Holy Flame Totem grants curse immunity.
Soul Mantle | Item acquisition | Soul Mantle can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.

Soul Mantle | Foulborn modifiers | This unique item can be Foulborn with one or more of the following Foulborn modifiers replacing the corresponding regular modifiers.

Soul Ripper | Description | Soul Ripper is a unique Quartz Flask. [1]
Soul Ripper | % Reduced Flask Charge Used | The Vaal Souls gained are will be the actual flask charges used. So if you have a 100 flask version and you have 15% reduced flask charges used you will gain 85 Vaal Souls.
Soul Ripper | % Chance of flask not using charges | This will gain you souls even when no charges are used.
Soul Ripper | % Increased Flask Effect | Increased flask effect will not increase the Vaal Souls gained.
Soul Ripper | Multiple Vaal Skills | Souls can be allocated to multiple Vaal skills.
Soul Ripper | Multiple Vaal Skills | If you have 2 Vaal skills with zero souls, and a 60 charges/souls flask, the souls will be shared between both skills, so you'll get near 30 souls for each.
Soul Ripper | Multiple Vaal Skills | With one full Vaal skill, and one empty Vaal skill, the souls go only to the empty skill.

Soulwrest | Description | Soulwrest is a unique Ezomyte Staff.
Soulwrest | Mechanics | Summon Phantasm : While wielding this warstaff , any time a corpse is consumed, a projectile spell-casting phantasm minion is created, similar to minions from Summon Phantasm Support. Support gems socketed in the staff can support Summon Phantasm without needing to be linked to each other.
Soulwrest | Mechanics | The when you Consume a corpse trigger condition can be met by any method that removes an existing corpse, [1] such as Raise Zombie , Detonate Dead , Spirit Offering , Void Sphere , or Absolution. It will not trigger when monsters are destroyed on-kill, or when corpses are removed by exceeding a skill's (e.g. Desecrate ) maximum number of spawned corpses. It requires corpse consumption by the player, not proxies.
Soulwrest | Mechanics | The maximum number of Phantasms that can be summoned is normally 11. This may be raised by Maximum # Summoned Phantasm from Summon Phantasm Support , for a maximum of 22 phantasms with a level 21 support gem. This can be doubled to 44 with The Dark Monarch , at the cost of giving up all your other minions.
Soulwrest | Mechanics | Because Summon Phantasm is triggered , it cannot be supported by Spell Echo Support. Minions will not be affected when this support is socketed in the staff. [2]
Soulwrest | Item acquisition | Soulwrest can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Soulwrest | Item acquisition | Soulwrest belongs to a special group of unique items called league-specific items , which can be obtained from certain divination cards and other sources in addition to their normal acquisition methods.
Soulwrest | Item acquisition | Delve league-specific Uniques can also drop deterministically from certain chests in Delve.

Southbound | Description | Southbound is a pair of unique Soldier Gloves.
Southbound | Mechanics | The modifier Your Hits can only Kill Frozen enemies means any hit damage ( attack , spell , or secondary damage ) cannot kill a non-frozen enemy, leaving it with 1 life. This affects all hits against enemies from the wielder, as well as hits from their skills used by proxies. Damage over time such as ignite or poison is unaffected.
Southbound | Mechanics | This modifier prevents culling strike and similar effects such as Slayer 's Headsman. When these effects cannot kill the enemy due to Southbound, they do not set life to 1, they do nothing.
Southbound | Mechanics | While Southbound affects the skill used by a proxy, it does not affect the proxy's non-skill hits (e.g. impale , Torchoak Step ).
Southbound | Item acquisition | Southbound can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.

Star of Wraeclast | Lore | The Star of Wraeclast was the jewel Daresso presented to Merveil as a marriage proposal. It was a Virtue Gem embedded into a necklace, one that gave the singer Kalisa Maas her immaculate singing voice. Unfortunately, the gem's thaumaturgical powers were what warped Merveil's body and mind into a monster. [1]

Starforge | Recipes | Starforge can be created from the following recipes:
Starforge | Item skins | The following item skins apply only to Starforge:
Starforge | Legacy variants | Starforge has legacy variants.
Starforge | Lore | The Starforge was created in the distant past by the Watchers of Decay to bind and imprison The Elder within the dream world. The Elder could not be killed, but the sword would keep its body and spirit - a shade - separated. Ages later, the shade detects the presence of a person in the dream world, Chief Arkhon Valdo Caisarius. The shade befriends Valdo, teaching the ways of shaping and how to reassemble the map device. Finally, it lures Valdo to his prison and asks him to free the Elder by pulling the sword out of his chest. Valdo refuses, and barely escape the dream world from the Elder's wrath.
Starforge | Lore | Before he could devise a way to banish the Elder for good, High Templar Venarius demands Valdo to reveal the secrets of the dream world. He refused and was imprisoned and publicly shamed, and it wasn't until Venarius threatened to kill his daughter when he gave into his demands. They enter the dream world and tempted with promise of power, Venarius pulls the Starforge out of the Elder's chest, freeing it.
Starforge | Lore | Flavor texts on Scarabs reveal that Starforge was created by the Order of the Djinn , of whom Egrin forged it, [1] Qianga delivered it to the Watchers, [2] and Betucia bore it to imprison the Elder, sacrificing themselves in the process. [3]

Storm's Gift | Description | Storm's Gift is a pair of unique Assassin's Mitts.
Storm's Gift | Description | This item has two drop-disabled variants: the synthesised version is Storm's Gift. The fractured version is Storm's Gift.
Storm's Gift | Mechanics | Enemies you kill are Shocked : When the character kills an enemy, its corpse is shocked. This shock has a base effect of 15% and a base duration of two seconds. It is affected by ailment modifiers.
Storm's Gift | Mechanics | Shocks you inflict spread to other Enemies within 1.5 metres : Shocks inflicted by the character proliferate in a 1.5 metre radius. This includes shocks inflicted on enemies that the character kills.

Stormseeker | Description | Stormseeker is a pair of unique Ambush Mitts.
Stormseeker | Mechanics | Trickster 's Soul Drinker and Essentia Sanguis provide overleech for energy shield, allowing permanent uptime of the shock modifier.
Stormseeker | Mechanics | The magnitude of chill is relevant for a few mechanics such as Call of the Void , Heatshiver , or Bonechill Support.
Stormseeker | Self-ailment interactions | Unaffected by Chill while Leeching Mana prevents the player from utilizing reverse chill mechanics from Winterweave. However, it is still possible to benefit from other sources of effects while chilled while avoiding its downside, such as The Fulcrum 's Damage Penetrates (8-10)% Elemental Resistances while you are Chilled modifier.
Stormseeker | Self-ailment interactions | Likewise, Unaffected by Shock while Leeching Energy Shield prevents the player from benefiting from shock damage scaling from self-inflicted Galvanic Field (due to reducing effective Shock Effect on you to 0), but allows effects such as The Fulcrum 's Elemental Damage with Hits is Lucky while you are Shocked without using equipment slots for Replica Winterheart or Inpulsa's Broken Heart.
Stormseeker | Self-ailment interactions | It is still possible to benefit from Winterweave 's reverse chill while using the Ignite/Chill/Shock benefits from The Fulcrum by simply avoiding getting any mana leech. Pure spellcasters avoid this problem entirely.

Stormshroud | Description | Stormshroud is a unique Viridian Jewel.
Stormshroud | Mechanics | Modifiers to Chance to Avoid being Shocked apply to all Elemental Ailments : Any modifiers with the effect #% chance to avoid being Shocked will also be applied to all other elemental ailments. At 100% total shock avoidance chance, the user will gain immunity to all elemental ailments , including Scorch , Brittle , and Sap , despite the character sheet not displaying avoidance chance for those ailments.
Stormshroud | Mechanics | Note that effects which grant Immunity to Shock / Cannot be Shocked or Unaffected by Shock does not apply to Stormshroud. [1] See ailment defences for more information.
Stormshroud | Item acquisition | Stormshroud can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Stormshroud | Recipes | Stormshroud can be created from the following recipes:
Stormshroud | Foulborn modifiers | This unique item can be Foulborn with one or more of the following Foulborn modifiers replacing the corresponding regular modifiers.

Stranglegasp | Infobox | Requires Level 52. +(10-16) to all Attributes. Can have 3 additional Enchantment Modifiers. Death's approach brings clarity. Acquisition Drop restricted Can drop after completing a Blight encounter in a Blight-ravaged map. Vendor Offer 6x Alchemy Shard
Stranglegasp | Description | Stranglegasp is a unique Onyx Amulet.
Stranglegasp | Mechanics | Can have 3 additional Enchantment Modifiers : This modifier allows up to four enchantments to be applied to Stranglegasp. These can be applied as anointments by Sister Cassia. Applying an enchantment to an item that has already reached its maximum number of enchantments will replace one at random.
Stranglegasp | Mechanics | A Corrupted Stranglegasp with undesirable anointments can still be re-anointed by removing current enchantments using the crafting bench (requires an Orb of Scouring ), and new anointments can be added with the additional cost of a Tainted Oil.
Stranglegasp | Mechanics | Corrupting ("bricking") Stranglegasp into a rare Onyx Amulet will not remove any of its anointments. The card Matryoshka also creates an item that emulates this outcome. This method is primarily used to Tainted Mythic Orb it into a random unique Onyx Amulet such as Carnage Heart or Replica Dragonfang's Flight. However, without the unique modifier that allows multiple anointments to be applied to it, attempting to replace one of them using a Tainted Oil after it is no longer a Stranglegasp will remove the other anointments as well, leaving it with only the one that was most recently applied.
Stranglegasp | Item acquisition | Stranglegasp has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Can drop after completing a Blight encounter in a Blight-ravaged map.
Stranglegasp | Recipes | Stranglegasp can be created from the following recipes:
String of Servitude | Infobox | Requires Level 1. <(1-2) Random corrupted implicit modifiers>. Implicit Modifier magnitudes are tripled Level Requirement reduced by 100 (Hidden). Corrupted. For the Vaal, the relationship between slave and master was as intimate and volatile as that of lovers. Acquisition Drop restricted Drop level: 10 Can only be obtained from The Vaal Omnitect. It always drops as corrupted (thus always replacing the base implicit). Has a chance to drop with two implicits when area level is 80 or higher.
String of Servitude | Description | String of Servitude is a unique Heavy Belt.
String of Servitude | Modifiers | String of Servitude is inherently corrupted with a random corrupted implicit already on it. It always replaces the basetype implicit +(25-35) to Strength.
String of Servitude | Modifiers | If the temple's area level is at 80 or more, Strings of Servitude has a chance to drop with two corrupted implicit modifiers. Note that some corrupted implicit mods are in the same mod group, thus they can't be on the same item.
String of Servitude | Modifiers | Implicit Modifier magnitudes are tripled : This modifier applies only to String of Servitude; it does not affect the implicit modifiers of other equipped items. The displayed magnitude of the implicit on String of Servitude is already tripled. [1] This modifier counts as 200% more implicit modifier magnitude and is multiplicative with quality from Tainted Catalyst.
String of Servitude | Modifiers | As the item is always corrupted, a Tainted Catalyst can be used to roll a random catalyst quality as well as a roll from (0-20)% quality.
String of Servitude | Item acquisition | String of Servitude has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Can only be obtained from The Vaal Omnitect. It always drops as corrupted (thus always replacing the base implicit). Has a chance to drop with two implicits when area level is 80 or higher.

Sublime Vision | Description | Sublime Vision is a unique Prismatic Jewel. It is a Shaper item.
Sublime Vision | Mechanics | The jewel has one hybrid mod which is related to a random aura skill. In the hybrid mod, the sentences Aura Skills other than <Aura> are Disabled and Auras from your Skills have (20-40)% increased Effect on you are presented in the all variant of this hybrid mod, and the actual variable sentence can be viewed in the infobox on the right or the table below.
Sublime Vision | Mechanics | Aura Skills other than <Aura> are Disabled : All Aura skills, including Banners , Curses linked with Blasphemy Support , and item exclusive Aura skills (e.g. Envy , Death Aura ) are disabled. This also includes skills with an Aura component, such as most Mine skills, Smite and Rejuvenation Totem. Non-aura reservation skills are unaffected. Vaal versions of the non-disabled aura can be used.
Sublime Vision | Mechanics | This item has different variations based on which Aura it generates with. Rerolling explicit values will not change the aura variation.
Sublime Vision | Item acquisition | Sublime Vision has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Drops from Uber Shaper or Uber Uber Elder bosses fights.
Sublime Vision | Recipes | Sublime Vision can be created from the following recipes:

Tanu Ahi | Mechanics | .when Leech is removed by filling Unreserved Life : This modifier only works with non-instant leech , and does not work if the player has modifiers that cause Life Leech effects are not removed when Unreserved Life is Filled. Instant leech and life gain on hit that heal the player to their unreserved maximum will prevent leech effects from ever applying, preventing this modifier from working. Using a small amount of degeneration such as Blood Rage or the "Skills Cost Life instead of #% of Mana Cost" Life Mastery or Attack Mastery will allow this effect to proc rapidly.

Taryn's Shiver | Description | Taryn's Shiver is a unique Maelström Staff.
Taryn's Shiver | Modifiers | The Enemies Frozen by you take 20% increased Damage is an effect that's tacked onto any ability you do which freezes an enemy while this weapon is equipped. As such, freezing an enemy and then weapon swapping will keep the damage debuff on an enemy. [ citation needed ] Since the attribute modifies the enemy's damage taken instead of your damage dealt it stacks additively with other effects that increase enemy damage taken, such as shock , but otherwise can effectively be considered a damage multiplier.
Taryn's Shiver | Item acquisition | Taryn's Shiver can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.

The Admiral | Description | The Admiral is a unique Varnished Coat.
The Admiral | Mechanics | All fire , cold and lightning damage from hits will use the lowest of all 3 elemental resistances on the monster for damage calculations. The damage type does not change.
The Admiral | Mechanics | The admiral opens up multiple options for damage scaling from hits with multiple elemental damage types. (These examples may not include all possibilities)
The Admiral | Interactions | When using Elemental Equilibrium , all damage types must be different from the resistance type you are lowering to lower enemy resistance further. Therefore a maximum of 2 damage types can benefit from Elemental Equilibrium, without needing to switch between damage types.
The Admiral | Interactions | The type of resistance penetration you use should match the resistance you target, not the damage types you deal. For example, if you're dealing cold and/or lightning damage and lowering fire resistance, you want fire penetration, not cold or lightning penetration. Generic elemental penetration works equally well.
The Admiral | Interactions | Inversion by Hits have #% chance to treat Enemy Monster Elemental Resistance values as inverted ( Elemental Mastery ) does not affect which resistance elemental damage is resisted by. This means it is typically not favorable, unless the target's lowest elemental resistance is still above zero.
The Admiral | Item acquisition | The Admiral has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. The Admiral drops from Admiral Darnaw , the boss of Contract: Death to Darnaw
The Admiral | Monster restrictions | This item can be acquired from the following monsters:
The Admiral | Legacy variants | The Admiral has a legacy variant.
The Admiral | Gallery | The 3D art appears to be a modified version of the Ringmaster Body Armour MTX.
The Admiral | Strategy | This sections goes into more detail about options 1 and 2 for damage scaling.
The Admiral | Strategy | For more basic info about options 1 and 2 see above.
The Admiral | Strategy | There are multiple factors that determine whether or not option 1 or 2 will scale more damage.
The Admiral | Strategy | Option 1:
The Admiral | Strategy | If the enemies resistance is known and the same enemy is killed over and over again, option 1 will probably scale more damage.
The Admiral | Strategy | For example: killing the same boss over and over again will do more damage with option one, because modifiers that lower or penetrate one enemy resistance can usually roll a higher max percentage than ones that affect all elements and there is no need to worry about enemies resistances changing.
The Admiral | Strategy | Option 2:
The Admiral | Strategy | Multiple factors can increase the chance of option 2 doing more damage:
The Admiral | Strategy | For example: A map has a modifier that raises monster resistances. While in that map An eater of worlds altar is activated that raises the enemies resistances. An unknown enemy who has extra resistance and max resistance is encountered.
The Admiral | Strategy | In the previous example the monsters total resistance for one element was overcapped so high that lowering that specific monsters resistance did not stop it from capping. When combined with maximum resistances this one particular monster will take much more damage from option 2 than option 1.
The Admiral | Legacy variants | The Admiral has a legacy variant.

The Arkhon's Tools | Description | The Arkhon's Tools is a unique Cloth Belt.
The Arkhon's Tools | Mechanics | Summon Skitterbots also summons a Scorching Skitterbot : The Scorching Skitterbot has an aura that inflicts Scorch , inflicting -10% to all Elemental Resistances at base value. This modifier scales with the minion's non-damaging ailment effect.
The Arkhon's Tools | Mechanics | Summoned Skitterbots' Auras affect you as well as Enemies : This modifier enables you to chill , scorch , and shock yourself using your Summon Skitterbots. The self-chill can be reversed with Winterweave , which in turn can also reverse the effect of Bonechill Support to grant reduced cold damage taken. Automation and Convocation and/or linking Meat Shield Support to Summon Skitterbots is recommended to keep the Skitterbots close to you.
The Arkhon's Tools | Mechanics | Arkhon's Tools can also be used to self-curse with Profane Proxy , replacing chill or shock with a curse aura of your choice.

The Balance of Terror | Description | The Balance of Terror is a unique Cobalt Jewel.
The Balance of Terror | Mechanics | This jewel can have 2 random modifiers of the following:
The Balance of Terror | Mechanics | It is possible for a single jewel to have multiple modifiers for the same curse. There are ( 18 2 ) = 153 {\textstyle \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}{\binom {18}{2}}=153} combinations of 2-mod jewels. There is a 1/17 chance to obtain a matching pair of mods in a 2-mod jewel.
The Balance of Terror | Mechanics | The if you've cast condition requires casting : using the curse spell manually. Activating (or deactivating) a Blasphemy aura instantly still counts as casting. Curses that trigger or are applied on hit with Hextouch Support or similar non-skill debuff modifiers do not count as casting. The condition is checked on the player; curses cast by proxies do not interact.
The Balance of Terror | Item acquisition | The Balance of Terror has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Drops from Lycia, Herald of the Scourge when The Blood of Innocence is applied to a Sanctum with any level of Forbidden Tome.

The Beachhead (High Tier) | Description | The Beachhead is a unique Harbinger Map.
