Unique item | Description | A unique item is an item with a specific name, unique artwork, and a predetermined list of modifiers. Unique items usually have the same implicit modifier as a normal item of the same type.
Unique item | Description | Unique items are meant to be less powerful overall than high-level rare items, but offer unique gameplay and allow special character builds to be based around them. [ citation needed ]
Unique item | Description | Currently there are 1,167 released unique items, including maps and items with modifier variants. For a timeline when each unique item was added, see the timeline of unique items.
Unique item | Description | This list does not include unique strongboxes and Vaal side areas.
Unique item | Obtaining unique items | The following is a non-exhaustive list of ways that unique items can be obtained. Unique items can always be traded.
Unique item | Legacy variants | Like all items, unique items can have legacy variants. This means for some uniques there exist better (or worse) versions that aren't dropping anymore in Standard leagues. The main source of legacy items are nerfs that affect future item drops, but leave the already existing items as they were. The only way to get these legacy items is from players who had them before they were changed.
Unique item | Legacy variants | Rerolling the item's modifier values with a Divine Orb may change a mod's values to match the current version of the unique item, but not for all of them. It will not add or remove modifiers that have been adjusted since then as well.
Unique item | Unique items designed by supporters | During the Closed Beta phase of Path of Exile 's development, supporters of the game that purchased the Diamond supporter pack were given the opportunity to collaborate on the design of a unique item. [4] For a period of time at the start of the Open Beta , Grinding Gear Games offered supporters a unique item design opportunity as a standalone purchase. [5] Once the Open Beta supporter packs were made available, Eternal and Ruler of Wraeclast supporters were likewise also given the opportunity to design a unique item. [6]
Unique item variant | Description | Many unique items can have several variants. These variants can be categorized into several categories, which also affect their generation and method of acquisition. Variants are distinctly different items from each other, so rerolling their modifier values with a Divine Orb will never transform them into another variant. It is possible for an item to both have basetype variants and modifier variants.
Unique item variant | Basetype variant | Basetype variants share the same name but have a different base item type.
Unique item variant | Basetype variant | Doryani's Delusion , Precursor's Emblem , and Grand Spectrum are both basetype variants and modifier variants.
Unique item variant | Basetype variant | Synthesised uniques and their fractured or regular (obtained via vendor recipe) versions are also considered basetype variants.
Unique item variant | Modifier variant | Modifier variants generate with distinct combinations of modifiers and cannot change between or reroll into other variants.
Unique item variant | Modifier variant | Lord of Steel and Impresence are distinct in having different art for each variant despite having the same basetype and name. They also have individual slots for each unique item art variant in the Unique Collection Tab ; the regular Elder and Uber Uber Elder variants of each damage type variant of Impresence share the same slots, however.
Unique item variant | Pseudo-variant | Pseudo-variants are sets of items which are distinct and different in name, but are typically treated as variants of the same item.

Unnatural Instinct | Description | Unnatural Instinct is a unique Viridian Jewel.
Unnatural Instinct | Mechanics | This item grants all bonuses of unallocated small passive skills in the jewel's radius. The jewel itself grants these bonuses and therefore the passives are not considered allocated, despite the player benefitting from their bonuses. Unnatural Instinct can also inherit altered passives (e.g. via Timeless Jewels ).
Unnatural Instinct | Mechanics | All allocated small passives in range grant nothing - If a branching path of passives is within the radius (e.g. around the Scion jewel sockets), allocating passives through the path that provides the least beneficial effect is preferred.
Unnatural Instinct | Mechanics | Cluster Jewel passives cannot be affected by radius jewels' effects, even if they are within the radius.
Unnatural Instinct | Item acquisition | Unnatural Instinct can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Unnatural Instinct | Recipes | Unnatural Instinct can be created from the following recipes:
Unnatural Instinct | Foulborn modifiers | This unique item can be Foulborn with one or more of the following Foulborn modifiers replacing the corresponding regular modifiers.

Vaults of Atziri | Description | Vaults of Atziri is a unique Vaal Pyramid Map.
Vaults of Atziri | Description | Vaults of Atziri is in the current map series (Keepers) for the Atlas of Worlds.
Vaults of Atziri | Layout | This map consists entirely of rooms filled with gold pots, chests, large chests, and the Atziri's Vessel chest , which contains 8 Sacrifice fragments and/or Vaal skill gems. There are no monsters, although Rogue Exiles and Tormented Spirits may occasionally still spawn. This map can be completed by activating the Vaal Vessel in the middle of the second room.
Vaults of Atziri | Item drops | The following drop-restricted items can drop in this area.

Vaults of Atziri | Legacy variants | Vaults of Atziri has legacy variants.
Vaults of Atziri | Alternate artwork | Somehow some of the foil Vaults of Atziri were generated on the Vaal Pyramid Map of the initial map series, and without Found Items have #% chance to drop Corrupted in Area mod. Using the Vaal Reliquary Key should potentially be able to spawn this map with all the map mods due to an undocumented bug fix.
Vaults of Atziri | Alternate artwork | In addition to the rainbow foil colour from the Vaal Reliquary, the map is also in the item pool of the Voidborn Reliquary. Lastly, Enclosed Grounds Valdo's Map also rewards this unique map, in Celestial Emerald colour, as the completion reward.

Venarius' Astrolabe | Description | Venarius' Astrolabe is a unique Astrolabe Amulet.
Venarius' Astrolabe | Mechanics | The stars are aligned if you have 6 Influence types among other Equipped Items : Influence types refer specifically to Shaper, Elder, Warlord, Redeemer, Crusader, and Hunter influence. Eldritch implicit modifiers, synthesised items, fractured items, and replica items are not influences. [1] It does not count its own influences; however, for other items, such as Bound By Destiny , it counts as having all six influences due to the Astrolabe Amulet implicit modifier.
Venarius' Astrolabe | Mechanics | Elemental Conflux causes all hits from any damage type to Ignite , Chill , and Shock.
Venarius' Astrolabe | Mechanics | As an Astrolabe Amulet , an experimented base type item that is not usually available outside of Grand Heists , it is possible to corrupt this item into a rare item "bricking" it, then complete the Onyx Amulet vendor recipe (vendoring this amulet with a red, blue, and green gem ) will result in a double-influenced amulet with two random influences (Shaper, Elder, Warlord, Redeemer, Crusader, Hunter).

Venopuncture | Description | Venopuncture is a unique Iron Ring.
Venopuncture | Mechanics | This item causes your bleeding debuffs to inflict a base 10% chill , affected by chill and ailment modifiers. This can be interesting in combination with The Golden Rule 's bleed reflection and Winterweave 's chill reversion. Other useful combinations in this setup include:
Venopuncture | Mechanics | Note that a chill from reflected bleeding can still carry undesirable effects, such as Snowforged 's -5% to Elemental Resistances. This is not reversed. Additionally, because The Golden Rule and Venopuncture apply to skills, but Winterweave 's The Effect of Chill on you is reversed does not, proxies like totems and Mirage Archer Support may significantly slow themselves if they inflict bleeding.
Venopuncture | Item acquisition | Venopuncture can drop anywhere. It can be chanced. Venopuncture belongs to a special group of unique items called league-specific items , which can be obtained from certain divination cards and other sources in addition to their normal acquisition methods.

Vendor Offer 10x Alchemy Shard 5x Alteration Shard
Vivinsect | Description | Vivinsect is a unique Unset Ring.
Vivinsect | Mechanics | Socketed Gems have 20% reduced Reservation Efficiency. It means if the player has no other increase/reduced (as well as more/less multiplier mods) Reservation Efficiency modifiers/passive skills, the socketed skill gem reserved [ 1 / ( 100 % − 20 % ) ] = 1.25 \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}[1/(100\%-20\%)]=1.25 more mana (or life). E.g. a normal Purity of Elements reserves 50% mana by default. If socketed in this ring and without other increase/reduced Reservation Efficiency modifiers/passive skills, the skill now reserves 62.5% mana.
Vivinsect | Mechanics | Increase/reduced Reservation Efficiency modifiers/passive skills are additive to each other and multiplicative to each more/less multipliers.
Vivinsect | Veiled modifiers | Vivinsect has a veiled modifier :
Vivinsect | Veiled modifiers | Unveiling an of the Veil suffix draws from a pool of generic veiled suffixes ( of the Order ).
Vivinsect | Item acquisition | Vivinsect has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Drops from executed Safehouse leaders in Research Safehouses. Only obtainable from Safehouses of area level 78 or higher.
Vivinsect | Monster restrictions | This item can be acquired from the following monsters:
Vivinsect | Ruthless mode | Although veiled rare items cannot be found in Ruthless mode , this item will still drop with a veiled modifier and can be unveiled.
Vivinsect | Legacy variants | Vivinsect has legacy variants.
Vivinsect | Legacy variants | The veiled mod unveiled on this item prior version 3.14.0 are crafted mod, thus can be removed via crafting bench, potentially brick the item. There are other numeric change in the veiled modifier. For details, read veiled modifier § Version history and relevant patch notes.
Vivinsect | Legacy variants | The crafting bench version of veiled modifiers are different between the version introduced in version 3.6.0 (and not obtainable on this item post-3.14), and the initial version released during Betrayal league. They have different mod id and number of tier (4 verse 3), but visually they may be the same.
Vivinsect | Legacy variants | The legacy mod Socketed Gems have 10% reduced Reservation Efficiency has the same effect as the current mod that provide 20% reduced Reservation Efficiency , as both mods support the socketed gem with unique support SupportIncreasedReservationUniqueExperimentation. A Divine Orb can be used to fix the displayed value.

Vixen's Entrapment | Description | Vixen's Entrapment is a pair of unique Embroidered Gloves.
Vixen's Entrapment | Mechanics | Despite the wording on the item as "curse skill" (singular), Vixen's Entrapment will actually trigger all socketed spell skill gems that have the curse gem tag simultaneously on cast of any other curse. It also explicitly works with both types of curse and makes no distinction between Hexes and Marks : Casting either one manually will trigger all of the socketed curses.
Vixen's Entrapment | Mechanics | Note that Bane does not have the Curse gem tag anymore.
Vixen's Entrapment | Mechanics | You can apply an additional Curse AdditionalCurseOnEnemiesUnique__2 Intrinsic You can apply an additional Curse increases the curse limit and stacks with other similar modifiers.
Vixen's Entrapment | Item acquisition | Vixen's Entrapment can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.

Vixen's Entrapment | Design attribution | He also created Essence Worm [2] and Witchfire Brew. [3]

Voidfletcher | Description | Voidfletcher is a unique Primal Arrow Quiver. It is a Shaper item & Elder item.
Voidfletcher | Skills | Void Shot
Voidfletcher | Interactions | There is an interaction that allows players to generate Void Charges at a faster rate than usual. This can be achieved by using the Mirror Arrow or Blink Arrow in conjunction with the Supreme Grandstanding keystone.
Voidfletcher | Interactions | When the character uses either of these skills, they create a clone of themselves that is equipped with the character's quiver. This means that the clone is also able to gain void charges. Since Supreme Grandstanding allows the character to share void charges with their clones, the character can use this interaction to gain void charges more quickly.
Voidfletcher | Interactions | It's important to note that although the clones are able to gain void charges, they cannot use the Void Shot skill themselves. Only the original character can do that.
Voidfletcher | Item acquisition | Voidfletcher has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Can only drop from the Uber Elder in The Shaper's Realm.
Voidfletcher | Monster restrictions | This item can be acquired from the following monsters:
Voidfletcher | Legacy variants | Voidfletcher has legacy variants.
Voidfletcher | Legacy variants | In addition, all pre-3.18 Voidfletcher has only one influence: Elder. Post-3.18 Voidfletcher has both Shaper and Elder influences.

Voidforge | Description | Voidforge is a unique Infernal Sword. It is a Shaper item & Elder item.
Voidforge | Mechanics | Damage Scaling
Voidforge | Mechanics | Voidforge adds seven times the damage from the weapon's total flat damage as a random element. When combined with large amounts of added Physical Damage from non-weapon sources, it can scale flat damage competitive with high elemental damage two-handed rare swords. Some examples of non-weapon sources of added Physical Damage are:

Voll's Protector | Description | Voll's Protector is a unique Holy Chainmail.
Voll's Protector | Mechanics | The Inner Conviction mod has the same effect as the keystone, Inner Conviction. Taking the keystone in addition to equipping this item will impart no additional benefit.
Voll's Protector | Mechanics | Gain a Power Charge for each Enemy you hit with a Critical Strike can grant multiple Power Charges per attack or cast, unlike other sources of Power Charge on Crit (which are limited to one per attack or cast) due to specifying "for each enemy hit".
Voll's Protector | Item acquisition | Voll's Protector can drop anywhere. It can be chanced. Volley Fire | Description | Volley Fire is a unique Viridian Jewel. It is a threshold jewel that enhances Barrage and its variants.
Volley Fire | Mechanics | As a threshold jewel, the full effect of Volley Fire can be gained only when it is placed in a jewel socket that meets the threshold requirement.
Volley Fire | Mechanics | This jewel causes Barrage to fire additional projectiles simultaneously on the first and final attacks of the firing sequence. These additional projectiles travel to the sides of the primary projectile in a fan-like configuration. This makes it easier for Barrage to hit more enemies at once; however, a single enemy can only be hit by any one projectile fired simultaneously. So that it does not benefit from mod such as Projectile Barrages have no spread of Far Shot.
Volley Fire | Mechanics | Additional projectiles fired simultaneously are separate from ordinary sources of additional projectiles. They do not count toward the number of projectiles for Fury Valve.
Volley Fire | Item acquisition | Volley Fire is drop disabled.
Volley Fire | Item acquisition | It can only be acquired from trading with existing owners of this jewel in the permanent leagues.
Volley Fire | Legacy variants | Volley Fire has legacy variants.
Voltaxic Rift | Infobox | Bow Physical Damage: 38-115 Elemental Damage: 1 to (600-750) Critical Strike Chance: 6.50% Attacks per Second: (1.54-1.61). Requires Level 64 , 212 Dex. Adds 1 to (600-750) Lightning Damage (10-15)% increased Attack Speed 100% of Lightning Damage Converted to Chaos Damage Your Chaos Damage can Shock Treats Enemy Monster Chaos Resistance values as inverted +40% to Maximum Effect of Shock. The eldritch storm descended upon us, and bruised lightning rained down. Metal withered and flesh melted before its arcane power. There was no escape, no shelter. Only despair. Vendor Offer 16x Alchemy Shard 6x Alteration Shard. Weapon DPS Physical: (117.8-123.2) Lightning: (462.8-604.6) Elemental: (462.8-604.6) Phys+Chaos: (117.8-123.2) Total: (580.6-727.7)
Voltaxic Rift | Description | Voltaxic Rift is a unique Spine Bow.
Voltaxic Rift | Mechanics | Treats Enemy Monster Chaos Resistance values as inverted : This modifier only applies to hits with this weapon. Inverts positive and negative chaos resistance values after factoring curses and debuffs like Void Gaze when calculating damage. Penetration applies to the inverted value.
Voltaxic Rift | Mechanics | +40% to maximum effect of shock is an additive Modifier that increases Shock's Maximum possible effect from the default of 50% Increased Damage Taken to 90% Increased Damage Taken and stacks with other sources of +X% to maximum effect of shock. It is different to X% increased Effect of Shock which effectively reduces the amount of damage needed to apply both a minimum and a maximum shock.
Voltaxic Rift | Item acquisition | Voltaxic Rift can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Voltaxic Rift | Recipes | Voltaxic Rift can be created from the following recipes:
Voltaxic Rift | Legacy variants | Voltaxic Rift has legacy variants.
Voltaxic Rift | Legacy variants | A Divine Orb can update the values of Adds # to # Lightning Damage and #% of Lightning Damage Converted to Chaos Damage (pre-2.3 version is automatically restored to 100% conversion [1] ) mods to match the current variant. However, a Divine Orb cannot add the new mod Hits with this Weapon Shock Enemies as though dealing 300% more Damage and +40% to Maximum Effect of Shock to this item. Moreover, the dev did not set a new default value of zero to the legacy mod #% chance to Shock so that it would be retained. Due to the nature of the table, the quasi-legacy variants created by using a Divine Orb are not listed in the table.
Voltaxic Rift | Design attribution | Voltaxic Rift was created by supporter Icestormer. [2]

Vorana's March | Description | Vorana's March is a pair of unique Runic Sabatons.
Vorana's March | Mechanics | Summon Arbalists
Vorana's March | Mechanics | This item does not have any sockets , so the Arbalists cannot be modified by support gems. Instead, the random modifiers found on the boots can modify the Arbalists directly.
Vorana's March | Mechanics | Taunt: Arbalists cannot taunt enemies.
Vorana's March | Mechanics | Cost: This Skill Costs nothing bypasses all other cost modifiers, including flat cost modifiers.
Vorana's March | Mechanics | Maximum number of Arbalists: Equipping this item will automatically summon the maximum number of Arbalists. By default, the cap is 2, and can be raised to 3 with the +1 to number of Summoned Arbalist modifier. This limit cannot be bypassed with Summon Triggerbots , nor is the trigger affected by Triggerbots.
Vorana's March | Item acquisition | Vorana's March has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced.
Vorana's March | Monster restrictions | This item can be acquired from the following monsters:

Watcher's Eye | Description | Watcher's Eye is a unique Prismatic Jewel.
Watcher's Eye | Description | It is one of the few items in the game that are universally usable in all builds, due to the highly useful and variable modifiers it can drop with. These modifiers are often powerful and in some cases not obtainable on other items. Depending on the modifiers' synergy, a Watcher's Eye has the potential to become one of the most valuable items in the game. Additionally, due to it being a unique item, it cannot be duplicated (e.g. mirrored ).
Watcher's Eye | Item acquisition | Watcher's Eye has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Drops from regular Elder if the Shaper remains alive (2 mod variant) and from Uber Elder (3 mod variant). Maven's Invitation: The Feared always drops the 2 mod variant.
Watcher's Eye | Monster restrictions | This item can be acquired from the following monsters:
Watcher's Eye | Recipes | Watcher's Eye can be created from the following recipes:
Watcher's Eye | Usage | Watcher's Eye is restricted to one per character. Due to this restriction, a single jewel that has all three mods for the character is highly valuable. Players generally look for jewels that work with the auras they already use, or can be activated by fitting in a Level 1 flat cost aura such as Vitality , Clarity , or Precision due to their minimal impact on overall reservation. Additionally, Watcher's Eye modifiers can be activated by auras from party members, Rogues in Heist (as well as Huck in maps ), and from Sentinels. Vaal versions of named auras will also activate the respective modifiers.
Watcher's Eye | Usage | Variants of the Watcher's Eye can boost offensive and/or defensive capabilities if the following auras are active:
Watcher's Eye | Random modifiers | The number of aura modifiers on the Watcher's Eye will depend on its source.
Watcher's Eye | Random modifiers | The numeric values of mods on the Watcher's Eye can be modified using Divine Orbs , but the specific modifiers themselves cannot be rerolled via currency. However, it is possible to reroll the modifier in the Menagerie by beastcrafting using a Wild Hellion Alpha ; doing so will reroll one random Aura-related modifier into any other Aura-related modifier.
Watcher's Eye | Random modifiers | There are ( 87 2 ) = 3741 {\textstyle \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}{\binom {87}{2}}=3741} combinations of 2-mod jewels and ( 87 3 ) = 105995 {\textstyle \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}{\binom {87}{3}}=105995} combinations of 3-mod jewels.
Watcher's Eye | Random modifiers | There is a ( 1 − \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}(1- 85 87 ) {\textstyle \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}{\frac {85}{87}})} or 2.3 % \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}2.3\% chance of finding a specific modifier on a 2-mod jewel and a ( 1 − \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}(1- 28 29 ) {\textstyle \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}{\frac {28}{29}})} or 3.4 % \color [rgb]{0.6392156862745098,0.5529411764705883,0.42745098039215684}3.4\% chance of finding a specific modifier on a 3-mod jewel.

Watcher's Eye | Legacy variants | The legacy DOT mods +(18-22)% to Damage over Time Multiplier while affected by Malevolence MalevolenceColdDamageOverTimeMultiplier Intrinsic +(18-22)% to Damage over Time Multiplier while affected by Malevolence and +(18-22)% to Damage over Time Multiplier while affected by Malevolence MalevolenceChaosNonAilmentDamageOverTimeMultiplier Intrinsic +(18-22)% to Damage over Time Multiplier while affected by Malevolence are changed from Cold Damage / Non-Ailment Chaos Damage over Time Multiplier (s) to +(18-22)% to Damage over Time Multiplier while affected by Malevolence in version 3.8.0. Thus, the legacy version can have a combined +(36-44)% to Damage over Time Multiplier while affected by Malevolence , but the current version cannot.

Whakawairua Tuahu | Description | Whakawairua Tuahu ( pronunciation ) is a unique Strand Map.
Whakawairua Tuahu | Description | Whakawairua Tuahu is in the current map series (Keepers) for the Atlas of Worlds.
Whakawairua Tuahu | Layout | The map is divided into 2 large areas and 1 boss arena. The first area, the one the player spawns in, is similar to Strand Map. The second area, accessed via a red portal found in the first region, is similar in style to the Ship Graveyard from Act I, and the boss arena is located in a cave entrance much like The Ship Graveyard Cave.
Whakawairua Tuahu | Layout | The Boss arena features an Ancient Seal (similar to the one that unleashes the darkness in the Vaal Ruins of Act 2). Interacting with the Seal spawns the Shade boss(es).
Whakawairua Tuahu | Layout | Note, it is advisable to finish the first area before moving on to the second via the teleporter, as there is no way to return to the first area other than by logging out or dying and respawning from the portal. The boss arena cannot be exited until all bosses are defeated.
Whakawairua Tuahu | Mechanics | While inside the map area, a modifier called Creeping Darkness is applied on all players:
Whakawairua Tuahu | Mechanics | Killing monsters will grant a temporary invisible buff that increases in light radius (and consequentially player IIR and player IIQ) based on the rarity of the enemy:
Whakawairua Tuahu | Mechanics | These bonuses are capped at 100% increased Light Radius, 100% increased Quantity, and 200% increased Rarity from kills and decays at a rate of 5%/5%/10% per second. The bonuses do not decay past the IIR/IIQ of your character excluding these buffs.
Whakawairua Tuahu | Mechanics | Sources of increased or reduced Light Radius from items also linearly apply an increase or decrease of IIQ and IIR at the same ratios of 1:1:2 which are not affected by the decaying buff. [1] It is also not affected by the 100/100/200% cap, meaning that it is possible to stack light radius to maintain very high IIQ/IIR stats in the map.
Whakawairua Tuahu | Mechanics | Blind does not decrease item rarity or item quantity as it does not actually affect light radius' numerical value.
Whakawairua Tuahu | Boss | A boss monster is spawned for every player in the party, depending on their class.
Whakawairua Tuahu | Boss | Once these are killed, there is a final boss:
Whakawairua Tuahu | Item drops | The following drop-restricted items can drop in this area.
Whakawairua Tuahu | Item acquisition | Whakawairua Tuahu can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.

Widowhail | Mechanics | #% increased Bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver : This modifier multiplies the values of scaleable bonuses granted by an equipped quiver. These bonuses can come from both implicit and explicit modifiers, including from corruption , like Bow Attacks fire an additional arrow.
Widowhail | Mechanics | Quivers with both an additional arrow implicit modifier and explicit modifier will grant 7 additional arrows with a 250% increased bonuses effect bow, as the stats are added together before multiplying. "Partial" arrows are not compatible with other sources of "partial" arrows like Dying Sun with additional flask effect. [1]

Willowgift | Description | Willowgift is a unique Jade Amulet.
Willowgift | Mechanics | Willowgift modifies the effect of Fortification so that it provides chance to Suppress Spell Damage instead. Players still need to increase the maximum stack of Fortification to 25 or above in order to acquire 100% chance to suppress spell damage from Fortification (4% times 25). Please read Fortification on how to acquire Fortification stacks and increase the maximum amount of Fortification.
Willowgift | Item acquisition | Willowgift can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Willowgift | Recipes | Willowgift can be created from the following recipes:
Willowgift | Legacy variants | Willowgift has a legacy variant.
Willowgift | Legacy variants | You do not inherently take less Damage for having Fortification and +4% chance to Suppress Spell Damage per Fortification is 1 hybrid mod , so a player can use a Divine Orb to obtain the latter on a legacy, uncorrupted Willowgift. However, this may be not economical, as a Divine Orb may worth more than Willowgift in permanent trade leagues.

Wine of the Prophet | Description | Wine of the Prophet is a unique Gold Flask.
Wine of the Prophet | Mechanics | Grants a random Divination Buff for 20 seconds when Used : When using the flask, it draws a random divination card from the list below, displaying it above the character, and granting the corresponding Divination buff effect. Divination buffs appear to be equally weighted and can roll the same buff back-to-back.
Wine of the Prophet | Mechanics | Divination Buffs are not Flask Effects, and you cannot have more than one at a time. They do not scale with flask effect or duration modifiers.
Wine of the Prophet | Mechanics | While various Divination buffs are mostly generically useful, certain buffs can grant effects that may be detrimental or build-disabling in certain circumstances. Players will need to manually re-use the flask to replace the buff or find an alternative solution to overcome the unwanted effect. In particular, this flask should typically be avoided with physical damage builds or chaos damage hit builds not using Brutality Support or Void Manipulation Support due to the risk of accidental death to elemental reflect. Notably:

Wings of Entropy | Description | Wings of Entropy is a unique Ezomyte Axe.
Wings of Entropy | Mechanics | Counts as Dual Wielding : Using Wings of Entropy counts as dual wielding , and therefore it benefits from the more attack speed and additional block chance of dual wielding. It also benefits from any modifiers pertaining to either dual wielding or two-handed weapons, but not one-handed weapons. However, it cannot be used to perform skills that require a two-handed weapon, such as Sweep. Wings of Entropy also opens new possibilities for skill and support choices because it provides the potential for dual wielding with a six-linked weapon, an option not normally available since one-handed weapons can have at most three sockets.
Wings of Entropy | Mechanics | Main hand and off hand : Since Wings of Entropy counts as dual-wielding, each of the main and off hand weapon damages can be modified separately. Both share the same base physical damage, but the main hand deals additional fire damage while the off hand deals additional chaos damage. Similarly, allocating the Ambidexterity passive skill will modify each hand separately.
Wings of Entropy | Item acquisition | Wings of Entropy can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Wings of Entropy | Recipes | Wings of Entropy can be created from the following recipes:
Wings of Entropy | Design attribution | Wings of Entropy was created by supporter Kohrock. [1]
Wings of Entropy | Alternate artwork | Since Ancient Reliquary Key can still be used after the end of Legacy leagues , it is possible to obtain Wings of Entropy on a Ezomyte Axe base, but still having the legacy mod.
Wings of Entropy | Alternate artwork | It is also one of the possible outcome in the Voidborn Reliquary.
Wings of Entropy | Alternate artwork | There is no Valdo's Map that awards this unique yet.
Wings of Entropy | Legacy variants | Wings of Entropy has legacy variants.

Winter Burial | Description | Winter Burial is a unique Crimson Jewel. It is a threshold jewel that enhances Glacial Hammer and its variants.
Winter Burial | Mechanics | As a threshold jewel, the full effect of Winter Burial can be gained only when it is placed in a jewel socket that meets the threshold requirement.
Winter Burial | Mechanics | This jewel adds a Cold-only Splash Damage effect to Glacial Hammer, which functions similar to Melee Splash Support. Strikes with Glacial Hammer that hit a target also deal damage to other targets in an area of effect. The area damage is equal to the cold damage portion of the strike, after any damage conversion is done. [1]
Winter Burial | Mechanics | Melee Splash Support can be used conjunction with Winter Burial. Doing so has limited utility though, since it will not double up on the splash damage effect. [1]
Winter Burial | Item acquisition | Winter Burial is drop disabled.
Winter Burial | Item acquisition | It can be acquired by trading with existing owners of this jewel in the permanent leagues.

Winterweave | Description | Winterweave is a unique Coral Ring.
Winterweave | Mechanics | The Effect of Chill on you is reversed will cause the action speed reduction from chill to become an increase instead. Because proxies do not inherit your global stats, this modifier does not affect chilled totems or mirages , which will be slowed normally.
Winterweave | Mechanics | One method to chill yourself is by using any source of physical damage taken as cold together with Heartbound Loop , Scold's Bridle , Boneshatter , or weapon-swapping a weapon with Triggers Level 20 Spectral Spirits when Equipped weapon from Essence of Insanity. Any of these methods will cause you to take physical damage, some of which is taken as cold damage instead, which can inherently chill you. This chill effect scales on the damage you take.
Winterweave | Mechanics | Other ways to chill yourself include:
Winterweave | Mechanics | Venopuncture and Icefang Orbit require you to be bleeding or poisoned, respectively - e.g. via The Golden Rule.
Winterweave | Mechanics | The reversed chill effect also reverses the effects of chill effect-related stats from chills that are reflected back to you (e.g. via The Fulcrum ):
Winterweave | Mechanics | If using Soul of the Brine King , avoid unlocking the 50% reduced Effect of Chill on you effect as this reduces the benefit of reverse chill. If already upgraded, it can be toggled off on a specific character by capturing the upgrade soul again.
Winterweave | Item acquisition | Winterweave can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.
Winterweave | Recipes | Winterweave can be created from the following recipes:
Winterweave | Legacy variants | Winterweave (Bloodboil) has legacy variants.
Winterweave | Legacy variants | Legacy Winterweave (Bloodboil) in permanent leagues retained the old name Bloodboil, while Winterweave (fated version) has its own legacy variant, as Bloodboil has a legacy variant (per-2.6.0), the legacy mod was able to carry over to Winterweave (fated version). Check the article of that item for details. The current version of Winterweave is not considered fated and drops generically.
Winterweave | Legacy variants | Winterweave (Bloodboil) also retained the legacy flavour text Rage is a big part of courage.

Woespike | Description | Woespike is a unique Steel Ring.
Woespike | Mechanics | #% chance on Melee Hit for the Strongest Impale on target to last for 1 additional Hit :
Woespike | Mechanics | By stacking this stat to 100% (e.g. with The Unseen Hand 's third ring and Abrasive Catalyst s), the strongest Impale debuff on an enemy may last an indefinite number of melee hits within its (considerably lowered) duration. This allows constant proccing of a single large impale (e.g. from Crushing Fist or Vaal Flicker Strike ) by a rapid-hitting skill such as Cyclone , Cyclone of Tumult , Perforate of Duality , Rage Vortex of Berserking , or Bladestorm of Uncertainty. [1]
Woespike | Mechanics | This effect does not apply to melee hits from proxies like Vaal Double Strike. [2] It can only apply to 1 impale debuff per hit, even when multiple impales share the position of 'strongest' (e.g. with The Impaler ).

Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 5 Concentrated Effect (120-160)% increased Armour and Evasion +(50-70) to maximum Life 4% reduced Mana Cost per Endurance Charge Gain Rampage while at Maximum Endurance Charges Lose all Endurance Charges when Rampage ends. Those who witness the shimmering scales of the wyrm know only fear for the rest of their lives. Fortunately, the rest of their lives can be measured in seconds. Vendor Offer 11x Alchemy Shard 6x Alteration Shard
Wyrmsign | Description | Wyrmsign is a pair of unique Wyrmscale Gauntlets.
Wyrmsign | Modifiers | Applicable skill gems socketed in this item are supported by level 5 Concentrated Effect Support. All support stats are accounted for, including the cost and reservation multiplier.
Wyrmsign | Modifiers | Wyrmsign grants Rampage when at maximum Endurance Charges. This can be achieved permanently for example by using items Fragility or Ahn's Heritage to decrease the maximum number of charges while using item modifiers to raise the minimum. The Ascendancy passive skill Conviction of Power also results in this. In this case the "Lose all Endurance Charges when Rampage ends" modifier has no effect. The boots Ralakesh's Impatience can also be used to always guarantee the Rampage effect, while also avoiding the downside of losing charges.
Wyrmsign | Item acquisition | Wyrmsign can drop anywhere. It can be chanced.

Ynda's Stand | Mechanics | Gain Ward instead of 50% of Armour and Evasion Rating from Equipped Body Armour : This stat will make your body armour provide 50% of the armour and evasion ratings it normally provides, after factoring quality and other local modifiers, and grant Ward equal to the amount of armour/evasion rating lost. This reduced value is used when calculating modifiers like #% increased Armour from Equipped Body Armour. This modifier can be scaled up to 60% with Tempering Catalysts.

Yoke of Suffering | Description | Yoke of Suffering is a unique Onyx Amulet.
Yoke of Suffering | Mechanics | Your Elemental Damage Can Shock : This modifier allows fire and cold damage to contribute to shock , but still requires chance to shock (for non-crit hits), or a critical strike (which inherently always shock). Skills used by proxies also have this property, similar to other offensive stats.
Yoke of Suffering | Mechanics | Enemies take #% increased Damage for each type of Ailment you have inflicted on them : This modifier causes each unique type of ailment to also apply 5-10% increased damage taken to the target. This can be applied by all direct ailments from you or your skills, including ailment auras such as Chilling Presence or Legacy of Fury , as well as ailments from skills used by proxies. [1] It cannot be applied by ailments from minions such as Summon Skitterbots , or from indirect effects like Sapped Ground or Vortex. ( Creeping Frost and Frost Shield 's chilling areas do apply it, as these are considered chills inflicted by the skill.)
Yoke of Suffering | Mechanics | Ailments are Ignite , Chill , Freeze , Shock , Scorch , Brittle , Sap , Bleeding , and Poison , totalling up to 90% increased damage taken with all 9 effects. However, the alternate ailments may be difficult to apply without disabling default elemental ailments. Some items that can do this include:
Yoke of Suffering | Interaction with mercenary | Because Yoke of Suffering applies increased damage to enemies, when equipped by a mercenary, the player will benefit from the increased damage based on the number of ailments inflicted by this mercenary on an enemy.
Yoke of Suffering | Item acquisition | Yoke of Suffering has restrictions on where or how it can drop. It cannot be chanced. Drops from Nightmare of the Unbreakable in Fortress Map.

Zerphi's Youth | Description | Zerphi's Youth was a unique Crimson Jewel. It was on the The Awakening closed Beta realm but never added to the core game. [1] It could be obtained as a possible outcome of applying a Vaal Orb to a non-unique Crimson Jewel. [2]
